ItacAcademyItem.Name: Ecclesiastica-Bologna (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: This Academy was created as a branch of the Accademia dell`Arcidiacono, This Academy was created as a branch of the Accademia dell`Arcidiacono and in parallel with the Accademia filosofica esperimentale, by Antonio Felice Marsili: `Due accademie nuovamente erette in Bologna dal dottiss. signor arcidiacono A.F. M. in sua casa`, in Giornale de’ letterati di Parma e Modena, IX (1687), p. 144, and Marta Cavazza, `Marsili, Antonio Felice,` in DBI. See the Arcidiacono Academy for more details.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
